name: GridLine.GridLabel
summary: The GridLabel class contains the grid labels of the grid lines, the text label and the insertion points.

constructors.name: GridLine.GridLabel
constructors.summary: Creates a new default grid label instance.

methods.name: GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox
methods.summary: The bounding box of the grid line label (rectangle format, axis aligned).

methods.name: GetAxisAlignedBoundingBoxOfTextLabel
methods.summary: The bounding box of the grid line label's text (rectangle format, axis aligned).

methods.name: MoveObjectRelative
methods.summary: Moves the object using the move vector.

properties.name: CenterPoint
properties.summary: The center point of the grid label.

properties.name: FrameHeight
properties.summary: The height of the grid label frame.

properties.name: FrameWidth
properties.summary: The width of the grid label frame.

properties.name: GridLabelPoint
properties.summary: The grid line's label point. If the value of GridLabelPoint differs from the OffsetGridPoint value, a leader line will be created to the GridLabelPoint position. You can remove the leader line by setting GridLabelPoint to the GridPoint value (or by setting the GridLabelPoint anywhere on the grid line, but then the offset will change).

properties.name: GridPoint
properties.summary: The grid line point, without offsets taken into consideration (model grid line coordinates).

properties.name: OffsetGridPoint
properties.summary: The grid line point where the grid line actually ends, with offsets applied.

properties.name: TextHeight
properties.summary: The height of the grid label's text frame.

properties.name: TextWidth
properties.summary: The width of the grid label's text frame.
